prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约8579→9055→8100→8577→9151，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年在8100–9151区间波动，2025年基准约9151名；本省物理类/理科计划2021年172人→2022年149人→2023年145人→2024年144人→2025年139人，逐年小幅缩减；2026年计划163人，较2025年扩招约17.3%，扩招幅度较大，竞争 压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第60名（2025年第61名），近年排名稳定在60名左右，属于中上水平综合类大学；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（院长论文造假被免职等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第48，评价为较热 ，短视频曝光量中等；社会学A、世界史A-，均为人文社科类学科，对物理类考生直接吸引力有限；但学校综合实力较强，工科专业体系完整。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 上海大学位于上海市，地域吸引力强；该校在贵州省招生占比约3–6 %，属于该校在西南地区的重要生源省份；电子信息/通信类（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等工科专业社会热度高，与上海大学物理类招生专业高度匹配，有利于维持报考热度；本省2 026年物理类考生约20.8万人，较2025年基本持平，竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9151名、2026年计划大幅扩招约17.3%（竞争缓解）、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考意愿、工科 专业社会热度高等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年明显后移（数字增大），预测最低位次约10149名，区间9649–10649名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 8579 → 9055 → 8100 → 8577 → 9151, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend. In the past three years, it fluctuated within the range of 8100–9151, with a baseline of about 9151 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category/Science was 172 in 2021 → 149 in 2022 → 145 in 2023 → 144 in 2024 → 139 in 2025, decreasing slightly year by year. In 2026, the plan is 163 students, an increase of about 17.3% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (61st in 2025), with a stable ranking around 60th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean's paper fraud leading to dismissal, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 48th in Douyin popularity, evaluated as relatively popular, with moderate short video exposure. Sociology is rated A, World History A-, both humanities and social sciences disciplines, with limited direct appeal to Physics Category candidates. However, the university has strong overall strength and a complete engineering discipline system.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 3–6%, making it an important source province in the southwest region. Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) have high social popularity and are highly matched with Shanghai University's Physics Category enrollment majors, helping to maintain application enthusiasm. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 208,000, basically unchanged from 2025, with a stable competition landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9151, the significant enrollment expansion of about 17.3% in 2026 (alleviating competition), negative reputation events that may suppress some application willingness, and high social popularity of engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward (increase in number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10149, with a range of 9649–10649.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 10149, with a range of 9649–10649. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Electrical and Electronic Information as main targets, while Tier 1 Excellent Engineer Class and Future Technology College can be attempted as reach options, and Tier 3 Economics and Materials as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 9649), it is recommended to focus on reaching for Tier 1 top engineering majors.
